title: jurinea kirghisorum
intro: Jurinea kirghisorum, also known as Turkestan hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Jurinea kirghisorum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of Jurinea kirghisorum are typically made by drying the roots and leaves of the plant, which can then be used to create teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal purposes.
